title: Phobophobia
overview: Step into the world of spine-chilling horror as your beloved final ghoul, Jessa Flux, unveils six bone-chilling horror shorts. Brace yourself for an eerie journey through Phobaphobia, the fear of fear itself. With Jessa Flux as your haunting guide, immerse yourself in the terrifying realms crafted by renowned horror directors. Encounter the unleashed fears of Coulrophobia, Claustrophobia, Wiccaphobia, Scelerophobia, Agrizoophobia, and Kosmikophobia. This anthology promises to leave you trembling in fear and yearning for more terror.
